title: Riders on the Storm
why_this_song: Riders on the Storm by The Doors (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Riders on the storm"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Riders on the storm"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Into this house we're born"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Into this world we're thrown"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Into this house we're born"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "riders" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "riders" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "storm" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "storm" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Riders on the Storm" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Riders on the Storm" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Riders on the Storm" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Riders on the Storm"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Doors one question about "Riders on the Storm", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Doors sobre "Riders on the Storm", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
